message:
fix: convert remaining exec_ref hostcall channel to bounded sync_channel(1024)

Apply the same unbounded→bounded channel migration to the exec_ref
hostcall dispatch path in extensions.rs. This was the one remaining
mpsc::channel::<ExecStreamFrame>() call that was not converted in the
previous commit. The bounded sync_channel(1024) prevents unbounded
memory growth when subprocess output outpaces consumer processing,
matching the backpressure semantics already applied to the other
exec stream paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
